title: Validate scheduler slot-fill and deferral reporting behavior
description: Add and run focused automated tests covering mid-cycle slot refill, structured deferral reasons, and CLI default suppression so the combined scheduler/reporter changes are verified together.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify newly ready beads can be dispatched within the same run_once() call after a worker completes.
Tests verify deferral reason strings are reported through the scheduler reporter path.
Tests verify CLI deferral output remains suppressed when verbose mode is disabled.
Existing scheduler and CLI test suites relevant to the changed paths pass or any residual failures are explicitly identified.
conflict_risks:
B-5d9cffda also modifies `src/agent_takt/scheduler/core.py` (adding `bead_deferred` call sites and reporter changes). It should rebase on this bead's commit to avoid conflicts.
CliSchedulerReporter (cli/commands/run.py:50) and TuiSchedulerReporter (tui/app.py:1075) both implement bead_deferred with a local parameter named summary — not reason. Protocol conformance is structural (duck typing), so this works at runtime, but sibling beads touching those files should be aware of the local naming mismatch if they refactor those methods.
None — changes are scoped to `run.py` and `parser.py`. No overlap with other in-progress beads.
